===Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer===
[[File:Elesa B2W2 Trailer.png|thumb|250px|Elesa in the Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer]]
In [[Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer]], Elesa appeared when {{ga|Nate}} walked into the [[Nimbasa Gym]] with his {{p|Emboar}}. She was shown waiting for him onstage and then questioning whether his Pokémon or her own Pokémon will prevail. Before challenging Nate to a match, she threw off her coat as fireworks were set off around her.
